findings.issue: A level-1 druid has only 1st-level spell slots, so it can only prepare 1st-level spells, but the list contains Agrandissement/Rapetissement (Enlarge/Reduce, 2nd), Aide (Aid, 2nd) and Amelioration de caracteristique (Enhance Ability, 2nd).
findings.correction: Replace the three 2nd-level spells with 1st-level druid spells (e.g., Soins/Cure Wounds, Baies nourricieres/Goodberry, Enchevetrement/Entangle); Amitie avec les animaux and Communication avec les animaux are already valid 1st-level choices.
